title: Single, Large Roth conversion (no IRA basis)
description: Pre-retiree (age 55) converts $80,000 from traditional IRA to Roth. No after-tax basis. Full $80k is ordinary taxable income in conversion year. Plus $90k W-2 → AGI $170k. Federal marginal 24%. Engine routes through adjustments.
expectations: Federal tax on $170k roughly 24% bracket region
